contentBlocks.original:
हनुमानञ्जनासूनुः वायुपुत्रो महाबलः ।
रामेष्टः फल्गुणसखः पिङ्गाक्षोऽमितविक्रमः ॥ 1 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
hanumānaṃjanāsūnuḥ vāyuputro mahābalaḥ .
rāmeṣṭaḥ phalguṇasakhaḥ piṃgākṣo'mitavikramaḥ .. 1..
contentBlocks.translation: Hanumān, the son of Anjanā and Vāyu, is immensely strong, dear to Lord Rāma, a close friend of Arjuna, tawny-eyed, and unlimited in courage.
contentBlocks.meanings: हनुमान् (hanumān) – Hanuman; अञ्जनासूनुः (añjanāsūnuḥ) – son of Anjanā (añjanā:Anjanā | sūnuḥ:son); वायुपुत्रः (vāyuputraḥ) – son of Vāyu (vāyu:Vāyu | putraḥ:son); महाबलः (mahābalaḥ) – immensely strong (mahā:great | balaḥ:strength); रामेष्टः (rāmeṣṭaḥ) – dear to Rāma (rāma:Rāma | iṣṭaḥ:dear); फल्गुणसखः (phalguṇasakhaḥ) – friend of Arjuna (phalguṇa:Arjuna | sakhaḥ:friend); पिङ्गाक्षः (piṅgākṣaḥ) – tawny-eyed (piṅga:tawny | akṣaḥ:eye); अमितविक्रमः (amitavikramaḥ) – unlimited in courage (amita:unlimited | vikramaḥ:courage);

contentBlocks.original:
उदधिक्रमणश्चैव सीताशोकविनाशकः ।
लक्ष्मण प्राणदाताच दशग्रीवस्य दर्पहा ॥ 2 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
udadhikramaṇaśchaiva sītāśōkavināśakaḥ ।
lakṣmaṇa prāṇadātācha daśagrīvasya darpahā ॥ 2 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: He who crossed the ocean, who removed Sītā’s sorrow, who restored Lakṣmaṇa’s life, and who destroyed the pride of Rāvaṇa.
contentBlocks.meanings: उदधिक्रमणः (udadhikramaṇaḥ) – he who crossed the ocean (udadhi:ocean | kramaṇaḥ:crossing); च (ca) – and; एव (eva) – indeed; सीताशोकविनाशकः (sītāśokavināśakaḥ) – who removed Sītā’s sorrow (sītā:Sītā | śoka:sorrow | vināśakaḥ:remover); लक्ष्मण (lakṣmaṇa) – Lakṣmaṇa; प्राणदाताच (prāṇadātā ca) – and life-giver (prāṇa:life | dātā:giver | ca:and); दशग्रीवस्य (daśagrīvasya) – of Rāvaṇa (daśa:ten | grīvasya:of necks); दर्पहा (darpahā) – destroyer of pride (darpa:pride | hā:destroyer);

contentBlocks.original:
द्वादशैतानि नामानि कपीन्द्रस्य महात्मनः ।
स्वापकाले पठेन्नित्यं यात्राकाले विशेषतः ।
तस्यमृत्यु भयं नास्ति सर्वत्र विजयी भवेत् ॥ 3 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dvādaśaitāni nāmāni kapīndrasya mahātmanaḥ ।
svāpakālē paṭhēnnityaṃ yātrākālē viśēṣataḥ ।
tasyamṛtyu bhayaṃ nāsti sarvatra vijayī bhavēt ॥ 3 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: These twelve names of the great Hanumān — the king among the vānaras — should be recited daily at bedtime and especially during travel. One who does so will have no fear of death and will be victorious everywhere.
contentBlocks.meanings: द्वादश (dvādaśa) – twelve; एतानि (etāni) – these; नामानि (nāmāni) – names; कपीन्द्रस्य (kapīndrasya) – of the king of monkeys (kapi:monkey | indra:king); महात्मनः (mahātmanaḥ) – of the great soul (mahā:great | ātmanaḥ:of the soul); स्वापकाले (svāpakāle) – at bedtime (svāpa:sleep | kāle:at time); पठेत् (paṭhet) – should recite; नित्यम् (nityam) – daily; यात्राकाले (yātrākāle) – during travel (yātrā:travel | kāle:at time); विशेषतः (viśeṣataḥ) – especially; तस्य (tasya) – his; अमृत्यु (amṛtyu) – no death (a:no | mṛtyu:death); भयम् (bhayam) – fear; न (na) – not; अस्ति (asti) – is; सर्वत्र (sarvatra) – everywhere; विजयी (vijayī) – victorious; भवेत् (bhavet) – will be;
